findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_series" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: PAID ($0.005). Current value of a reference series — e.g. series=policy-rate, vat, minimum-wage. Every value carries its official source citation, effective dat…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_snapshot" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: PAID ($0.02). Snapshot of every series for every country in one call. Pass api_key if you have one; otherwise the response explains how to pay via x402.
